entities.name: P15
entities.context: Principle about completeness - no stubs or incomplete sections allowed

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: Persona/role that receives handoff after design passes validation gates

entities.name: Quality Gates
entities.context: Five-gate validation framework: completeness, distinctness, pattern application, usability, integration

entities.name: Fresh Thread Test
entities.context: Method to ensure content is understandable in isolation without prior context

entities.name: Validation Phase
entities.context: Quality assurance phase where designs must pass all five gates

entities.name: Mandatory Structure
entities.context: Required document format including frontmatter and specific sections

entities.name: overlap_blindness
entities.context: Anti-pattern of not checking existing personas before continuing design

entities.name: abstract_design
entities.context: Anti-pattern of lacking concrete techniques and workflows

entities.name: stub_sections
entities.context: Anti-pattern of incomplete sections, violates P15

entities.name: teaching_gap
entities.context: Anti-pattern of not explaining design choices

entities.name: boundary_blur
entities.context: Anti-pattern of unclear boundaries on when to use vs not use

relationships.context: Stub sections are explicitly a P15 violation
Quality gates are the checkpoints within validation phase
Builder receives handoff only after design passes all 5 gates
Fresh thread test supports gate_4 usability requirement
Checking existing personas supports gate_2 distinctness requirement
